response.justification: Bogdan brings 13+ years of full-stack engineering experience well beyond the 6+ year requirement, with strong recent work in TypeScript, Node.js, and React that aligns with the primary stack. His recent role at re:cinq included AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, directly matching the AI agent development requirement. Testing rigor (TDD advocate, authored a D test runner, taught Selenium courses) and architecture breadth (web, mobile, embedded, GIS platform on Kubernetes) suggest he can deliver reliable end-to-end features. Gaps around explicit Nest.js, Vitest, and Kotlin are minor given his polyglot track record and should be probed in interview.
strengths: 13+ years full-stack with strong TypeScript/Node.js/React alignment to primary stack
Hands-on AI agent infrastructure and MCP tooling experience at re:cinq
Deep testing and craftsmanship culture (TDD, CI/CD, authored test runner, ran workshops)
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed; testing stack leans toward other frameworks
Career gap since October 2025 (~7 months) warrants a brief conversation
Kotlin not mentioned; secondary-stack coverage relies on older Java experience
